summary: Comprehensive testing of MINEX GLOBAL UI/UX visual upgrade completed. All 22 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified all pages render correctly with new glassmorphism design, dark sidebar layouts, and theme toggle functionality. All business logic and functionality remains intact after the visual upgrade.
passed_tests: User login flow works correctly
Admin login flow works correctly
User dashboard displays correct balances (wallet_balance, roi_balance, commission_balance)
User dashboard shows deposited_capital ($1,000.00)
User dashboard shows active promotion with countdown timer
Admin dashboard displays correct stats (5 users, $1,000 deposits, $0 withdrawals)
Admin dashboard shows pending actions (3 pending deposits)
Admin theme toggle (dark/light) works correctly
Navigation works correctly for user layout (all 8 nav items)
Navigation works correctly for admin layout (all 7 nav items)
Investment packages display correctly on homepage
Deposit page shows deposit history with status badges
Withdrawal page shows balance, schedule, and limits
Staking/Invest page shows packages and investment history
Profile page shows user info and referral code
Logout functionality works correctly
Landing page hero section with particles renders correctly
Landing page crypto ticker displays live prices
Landing page FAQ accordion works
Landing page testimonials carousel works
Glassmorphism cards render correctly (22 found)
Gradient text elements render correctly (6 found)
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX upgrade testing complete. All visual changes verified: glassmorphism cards, dark sidebar layouts, theme toggle, gradient text, particles background, crypto ticker. All business logic and API endpoints working correctly. No functionality changes were made - this was purely a visual upgrade.

user_dashboard.level_progress: PASS - Current level benefits and next level progress
